data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic notifications to qualified substitutes upon cancellation. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that such notifications are being sent, nor does it confirm the existence of a mechanism to trigger these notifications. The linked use case outlines the need for this functionality but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
